home.title: Time Shuttle — Free Online Timestamp & Date Converter
home.subtitle: Convert Unix timestamps, dates, and time zones instantly in your browser. 100% private, no uploads, no registration.
home.privacyBadge: Your data never leaves your device
home.feature1Desc: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa. Supports both seconds and milliseconds.
home.feature2Desc: All conversions happen in your browser using native Date and Intl APIs. No data is ever uploaded.
home.feature3Desc: See the same moment as Unix (s), Unix (ms), ISO 8601, RFC 2822, UTC string, and localized date — all at once.
home.feature4Desc: Convert dates between any timezones using the full IANA timezone database. No hardcoded offsets.
home.feature5Desc: Instantly see '3 hours ago' or 'in 2 days' with Intl.RelativeTimeFormat, localized for English and Chinese.
home.feature6Desc: No limits, no ads, no hidden fees. Full-featured timestamp toolkit at zero cost.
home.step1Desc: Type a Unix timestamp (seconds or milliseconds) or a human-readable date in the input field
home.step2Desc: The tool instantly shows the same moment in every format — Unix, ISO 8601, RFC, UTC, localized, and relative
home.step3Desc: Copy any result with one click, or use the timezone converter to see the time in a different zone
home.whyTitle: The Complete Timestamp Toolkit for Developers
home.whyP1: Unix timestamps are the universal language of computing. From database records and API responses to log files and cache headers, timestamps are everywhere. But converting between Unix time and human-readable dates, handling timezone differences, and calculating relative time intervals are tasks developers face daily. Time Shuttle brings all these capabilities together in a single, fast, privacy-focused interface.
home.whyP2: Unlike other online timestamp tools that send your data to remote servers, Time Shuttle performs every conversion entirely in your browser using native JavaScript Date and Intl APIs. Your data — whether it's API timestamps, database records, or log entries — never leaves your device. Support for all IANA timezones, automatic seconds/milliseconds detection, batch conversion, and real-time 'now' display make it the fastest way to handle time-related tasks.

tools.batchPlaceholder: Enter multiple Unix timestamps, one per line...

about.heroSubtitle: A free, privacy-first timestamp and date conversion tool that runs entirely in your browser.
about.serviceP1: Time Shuttle is a free online tool for converting Unix timestamps, human-readable dates, and timezones. It supports bidirectional conversion, multi-format output, timezone conversion using the full IANA database, relative time calculation, and batch processing.
about.serviceP2: Every operation happens in your browser using native JavaScript APIs — Date, Intl.DateTimeFormat, Intl.RelativeTimeFormat. No data is ever sent to a server, making Time Shuttle ideal for developers, security engineers, and anyone working with timestamps.
about.safeDesc: All conversions happen in your browser. No server processing, no data uploads.
about.privacyDesc: We don't collect, store, or transmit any of your data. What you convert stays on your device.
about.ttlDesc: Use all features instantly — no sign-up, no email, no tracking.
about.fastDesc: Native browser APIs ensure instant conversion with zero latency.
about.supportDesc: Time Shuttle is free and open-source. If you find it useful, share it with others!
about.contactDesc: Have questions, feedback, or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Time Shuttle is a free, client-side timestamp conversion tool. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains our data practices.
privacyPage.section1Content: Time Shuttle performs all timestamp and date conversions entirely in your browser using native JavaScript APIs (Date, Intl.DateTimeFormat, Intl.RelativeTimeFormat). We do not collect, store, or transmit any data you enter into the tool.
privacyPage.section2Content: Time Shuttle does not use cookies for tracking or analytics. The only client-side storage used is localStorage for your theme and language preferences, which never leaves your device.
privacyPage.section3Content: We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any other tracking service. We have no way to identify you or track your usage.
privacyPage.section4Content: Time Shuttle is hosted on Cloudflare Workers as a static site. Cloudflare may collect standard access logs (IP address, user agent) as part of its infrastructure. Please refer to Cloudflare's privacy policy for details.
privacyPage.section5Content: Time Shuttle does not integrate with any third-party services that collect user data. There are no advertising networks, analytics platforms, or social media trackers.
privacyPage.section6Content: Time Shuttle is open-source under the AGPL-3.0 license. You can review the complete source code on GitHub to verify our privacy claims.
privacyPage.section7Content: Time Shuttle does not knowingly collect any personal information from children under 13. The tool is suitable for all ages.
privacyPage.section8Content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
privacyPage.footer: For questions about this privacy policy, contact support@shuttlelab.org

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: By using Time Shuttle, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
termsPage.section1Content: Time Shuttle is a free, client-side timestamp and date conversion tool. All processing happens in your browser. We do not guarantee the accuracy of timezone data, which relies on the browser's Intl API implementation.
termsPage.section2Content: You may use Time Shuttle for any lawful purpose. You agree not to use the tool in any way that could damage, disable, or impair the service.
termsPage.section3Content: Time Shuttle and its original content are owned by ShuttleLab and licensed under the AGPL-3.0 license. You may use, modify, and distribute the source code in accordance with the license terms.
termsPage.section4Content: Time Shuttle is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the tool will be error-free, accurate, or available at all times.
termsPage.section5Content: In no event shall ShuttleLab be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of Time Shuttle.
termsPage.section6Content: Time Shuttle does not collect, store, or transmit any user data. All conversions happen locally in your browser.
termsPage.section7Content: Time Shuttle may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites.
termsPage.section8Content: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue Time Shuttle at any time without notice.
termsPage.section9Content: These terms are governed by applicable international laws. Any disputes shall be resolved through negotiation.
termsPage.section10Content: For questions about these terms, contact support@shuttlelab.org.
termsPage.refundContent: Time Shuttle is completely free to use. There are no payments, subscriptions, or paid features. Since no financial transactions occur, there is no refund policy applicable. If you have questions, contact support@shuttlelab.org.
termsPage.footer: These terms were last updated on 2026-06-09.
